ValidationRule.description: Validation rule prevents users from being able to select the value Non-Deal Approval as the ticket Type. Non-Deal Approval tickets can only be created as a result of a Non-Deal Approval record getting approved.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To create a Non-Deal Approval type ticket, first, navigate to the Deal tab and create a Non-Deal Approval record. Once approved, a Non-Deal Approval ticket will be created automatically.
